semantic_comment: OpenAI branding and video/image generation workflow point to Sora.
Image panels, edit controls, and generative image UI cues fit Imagen more than video-first entries.
Gemini/Google access-path cues plus video outputs indicate Veo as the foundation video model.
Large Flow-like blue mark and filmmaking storyboard interface suggest Google's Flow client workflow.
Short-video timeline, clip comparison, and production workflow cues fit Seedance.
Prompt-to-moodboard/image variation workflow and Whisk-like mark suggest Whisk.
Multi-image generation/editing comparison layout with compact model controls best fits Nano Banana.
